name: LeadForge Offer Audit Engine
purpose: Turn reviewed LeadForge leads into qualified outreach, audit, and offer-readiness opportunities without changing the source lead data.

outputs: LeadForge Master Viewer.xlsx tabs: Owner Contact Points, Offer Readiness, Qualification Guide
loopModel.cadenceRule: Run after every merge, rejection cycle, collector cycle, or durable viewer/system fix. Do not block the lead collector; reuse current master and pending evidence.

allowedSources: public social profiles for the business or named decision-maker
Google Business Profile-visible public facts where manually reviewed
disallowedSources: personal contact details not published for business use
logged-in-only content unless the user explicitly performs a manual review
publicOsintPolicy.ownerNumberRule: Store owner-direct numbers only when they are clearly public business contact data tied to the owner or decision-maker. Otherwise use the public business phone and label it as such.

frameworksUsed: BANT for fast readiness cues: budget proxy, authority, need, timeline
MEDDIC-lite for deeper opportunities: metrics, economic buyer, decision criteria, pain, champion
GPCT for value-first discovery: goals, plans, challenges, timeline
Local SEO fit using relevance, distance, and prominence

offerFamilies.name: AI Website / No Website Rescue
offerFamilies.trigger: No first-party website or weak website/contact path
offerFamilies.valueFirstAsset: 1-page site gap snapshot with recommended homepage/contact path

offerFamilies.name: AI SEO and GEO Audit
offerFamilies.trigger: Website exists but has weak service-area, answer-engine, or conversion signals
offerFamilies.valueFirstAsset: AI/local visibility audit with 3 practical fixes

offerFamilies.name: Reviews and Local Prominence
offerFamilies.trigger: Local service business where reviews, citations, or Google Business Profile signals likely matter
offerFamilies.valueFirstAsset: Local trust snapshot and review/citation improvement checklist

offerFamilies.name: Best Services Listing Spot
offerFamilies.trigger: High-fit local niche and city with directory/listing monetization potential
offerFamilies.valueFirstAsset: Sample profile/listing preview and weekly/monthly placement option

offerFamilies.name: Conversion Path Cleanup
offerFamilies.trigger: Website has contact friction, unclear booking, weak CTA, or third-party-only scheduler
offerFamilies.valueFirstAsset: Screenshot-backed funnel note and quick-win recommendation

rules: Do not start with a generic pitch.
Lead with one useful observation from public evidence.
Use business-published phone, email, contact form, or social page as context only until outreach tooling is explicitly configured.
Do not automate SMS or WhatsApp without opt-in and opt-out handling.
Never contact private/personal numbers found outside public business context.
